_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PANEL
name: Gregtech New Horizons 2.8.X
author: looordi@orkenstein.com
description:
GTNH egg for versions 2.8.0+ (Java 17-25).
Comes with an update script that handles updates easily.
Just change the version and reinstall.
Make sure to back up before reinstalling!

More info:
https://wiki.gtnewhorizons.com/wiki/Server_Setup#Server_Update

https://www.gtnewhorizons.com/downloads/

Daily builds: set GTNH_DAILY=true to install the latest successful server-new-java GitHub Actions artifact. Stable GTVERSION remains default.

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Gregtech New Horizons V2.8.X Install Script
# Supports stable releases by version and optional latest daily build.
# Safer v2: download + validate into temp first, then replace old pack files.

set -euo pipefail
trap 'echo "ERROR: install failed on line $LINENO"; exit 1' ERR

: "${GTVERSION:=2.8.4}"
: "${GTNH_DAILY:=false}"
: "${GITHUB_TOKEN:=}"

BASE_DIR="/mnt/server"
BACKUP_DIR="$BASE_DIR/installtemp"
WORK_DIR="$BASE_DIR/.gtnh-install-work"
EXTRACT_DIR="$WORK_DIR/extracted"
ARTIFACT_DIR="$WORK_DIR/artifact"

mkdir -p "$BASE_DIR"

# Install dependencies
if command -v apt &>/dev/null; then
  apt update
  DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive apt install -y curl jq unzip ca-certificates findutils rsync
elif command -v apk &>/dev/null; then
  apk --no-cache add bash curl jq unzip ca-certificates findutils rsync
else
  echo "No supported package manager found. Need curl, jq, unzip, ca-certificates, findutils and rsync."
  exit 1
fi

rm -rf "$WORK_DIR"
mkdir -p "$EXTRACT_DIR" "$ARTIFACT_DIR"

github_api_curl() {
  if [[ -n "${GITHUB_TOKEN}" ]]; then
    curl -fsSL --retry 3 --retry-delay 3 \
      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${GITHUB_TOKEN}" \
      -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" \
      -H "X-GitHub-Api-Version: 2022-11-28" \
      "$@"
  else
    curl -fsSL --retry 3 --retry-delay 3 \
      -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" \
      -H "X-GitHub-Api-Version: 2022-11-28" \
      "$@"
  fi
}

github_download_curl() {
  if [[ -n "${GITHUB_TOKEN}" ]]; then
    curl -fL --retry 3 --retry-delay 3 \
      -H "Authorization: Bearer ${GITHUB_TOKEN}" \
      -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" \
      -H "X-GitHub-Api-Version: 2022-11-28" \
      "$@"
  else
    curl -fL --retry 3 --retry-delay 3 \
      -H "Accept: application/vnd.github+json" \
      -H "X-GitHub-Api-Version: 2022-11-28" \
      "$@"
  fi
}

validate_pack() {
  local dir="$1"

  if [[ ! -f "$dir/java9args.txt" ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: downloaded pack is missing java9args.txt"
    echo "Contents of extracted directory:"
    find "$dir" -maxdepth 2 -type f | sed 's#^#  #' | head -n 80
    exit 1
  fi

  if [[ ! -f "$dir/lwjgl3ify-forgePatches.jar" ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: downloaded pack is missing lwjgl3ify-forgePatches.jar"
    echo "Contents of extracted directory:"
    find "$dir" -maxdepth 2 -type f | sed 's#^#  #' | head -n 80
    exit 1
  fi

  echo "Pack validation OK: java9args.txt and lwjgl3ify-forgePatches.jar found."
}

download_stable_to_temp() {
  local gtnh_zip_file="GT_New_Horizons_${GTVERSION}_Server_Java_17-25.zip"
  local gtnh_url="https://downloads.gtnewhorizons.com/ServerPacks/${gtnh_zip_file}"

  echo "Daily builds disabled. Downloading stable GTNH ${GTVERSION}..."
  echo "Downloading ${gtnh_url}"

  curl -fL --retry 3 --retry-delay 3 -o "$WORK_DIR/$gtnh_zip_file" "$gtnh_url"
  unzip -q -o "$WORK_DIR/$gtnh_zip_file" -d "$EXTRACT_DIR"
  validate_pack "$EXTRACT_DIR"
}

download_daily_to_temp() {
  echo "Daily builds enabled. Searching latest successful GTNH daily server-new-java artifact..."

  if [[ -z "${GITHUB_TOKEN}" ]]; then
    echo "NOTICE: GITHUB_TOKEN is empty. GitHub may refuse artifact downloads without a token."
  fi

  local runs_api="https://api.github.com/repos/GTNewHorizons/DreamAssemblerXXL/actions/workflows/daily-modpack-build.yml/runs?branch=master&status=success&per_page=10"
  local runs_json
  runs_json="$(github_api_curl "$runs_api")"

  local artifact_json=""
  local run_id=""

  while read -r run_id; do
    [[ -z "$run_id" || "$run_id" == "null" ]] && continue
    echo "Checking workflow run ${run_id}..."
    artifact_json="$(github_api_curl "https://api.github.com/repos/GTNewHorizons/DreamAssemblerXXL/actions/runs/${run_id}/artifacts" \
      | jq -c '.artifacts[]? | select((.expired == false) and (.name | endswith("server-new-java")))' \
      | head -n1 || true)"
    if [[ -n "$artifact_json" && "$artifact_json" != "null" ]]; then
      break
    fi
  done < <(jq -r '.workflow_runs[].id' <<< "$runs_json")

  if [[ -z "$artifact_json" || "$artifact_json" == "null" ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: Could not find a non-expired GTNH daily server-new-java artifact."
    exit 1
  fi

  local artifact_name
  local download_url
  artifact_name="$(jq -r '.name' <<< "$artifact_json")"
  download_url="$(jq -r '.archive_download_url' <<< "$artifact_json")"

  echo "Found artifact: ${artifact_name}"
  echo "Downloading daily artifact archive..."

  if ! github_download_curl -o "$WORK_DIR/gtnh-daily-artifact.zip" "$download_url"; then
    echo "ERROR: GitHub artifact download failed."
    echo "For daily builds, create a GitHub Personal Access Token and put it in the egg variable GITHUB_TOKEN."
    echo "The token only needs public repository read access for this use."
    exit 1
  fi

  echo "Extracting artifact archive..."
  unzip -q -o "$WORK_DIR/gtnh-daily-artifact.zip" -d "$ARTIFACT_DIR"

  echo "Artifact contents:"
  find "$ARTIFACT_DIR" -maxdepth 2 -type f | sed 's#^#  #' | head -n 80

  local daily_zip
  daily_zip="$(find "$ARTIFACT_DIR" -type f \( -name '*Server_Java_17-25.zip' -o -name '*server-new-java.zip' -o -name '*.zip' \) | head -n1 || true)"

  if [[ -z "$daily_zip" ]]; then
    echo "ERROR: Daily artifact did not contain a server zip."
    exit 1
  fi

  echo "Extracting daily server zip: ${daily_zip}"
  unzip -q -o "$daily_zip" -d "$EXTRACT_DIR"
  validate_pack "$EXTRACT_DIR"
}

case "${GTNH_DAILY,,}" in
  true)
    download_daily_to_temp
    ;;
  false)
    download_stable_to_temp
    ;;
  *)
    echo "ERROR: GTNH_DAILY must be true or false."
    exit 1
    ;;
esac

# Backup JourneyMapServer from current install, if present
rm -rf "$BACKUP_DIR"
mkdir -p "$BACKUP_DIR"

if [[ -d "$BASE_DIR/config/JourneyMapServer" ]]; then
  echo "Backing up JourneyMapServer to $BACKUP_DIR..."
  cp -a "$BASE_DIR/config/JourneyMapServer" "$BACKUP_DIR/"
else
  echo "No JourneyMapServer directory found to back up."
fi

# Replace only GTNH pack-managed files/folders after the new pack has been validated.
echo "Replacing old GTNH pack files and folders..."
rm -rf \
  "$BASE_DIR/config" \
  "$BASE_DIR/libraries" \
  "$BASE_DIR/mods" \
  "$BASE_DIR/lwjgl3ify-forgePatches.jar" \
  "$BASE_DIR/java9args.txt"

rsync -a --exclude='.gtnh-install-work' --exclude='installtemp' "$EXTRACT_DIR"/ "$BASE_DIR"/
rm -f "$BASE_DIR"/*.md "$BASE_DIR"/*.bat

if [[ -f "$BASE_DIR/startserver-java9.sh" ]]; then
  chmod +x "$BASE_DIR/startserver-java9.sh"
fi

# Restore backed-up JourneyMapServer
if [[ -d "$BACKUP_DIR/JourneyMapServer" ]]; then
  echo "Restoring JourneyMapServer from installtemp..."
  mkdir -p "$BASE_DIR/config"
  cp -a "$BACKUP_DIR/JourneyMapServer" "$BASE_DIR/config/"
else
  echo "No JourneyMapServer backup found - skipping restore."
fi

rm -rf "$WORK_DIR"

echo "Installation process is completed"

variables.name: Modpack version
variables.description: GTNH version for java 17-25 file. 2.8.x and up supported

variables.name: Hardcore Mode
variables.description: Enable Hardcore Mode for the world

variables.name: Max Players
variables.description: Set a total server player limit

variables.name: Server Seed
variables.description: Set a custom seed for the World map

variables.name: Query Port
variables.description: Set the query port for the server

variables.name: Use Daily Builds
variables.description: Use latest successful GTNH daily server-new-java build instead of stable GTVERSION. Default false.

variables.name: GitHub Token
variables.description: Optional but recommended for daily builds. Needed if GitHub refuses or rate-limits artifact downloads. Leave empty for stable builds.
